rationale.R1.7: The delegation explicitly and exclusively requests citation checking. The artifact contains three identifiable citations—Hageman and Young (1981), Anderson et al. (1992) LAPACK Users' Guide first edition, and Saad (2003)—each carrying specific attributed content (splitting-based iterative taxonomy, first-edition LAPACK driver conventions, preconditioner family selection). Verifying author names, publication years, edition numbers, and whether the attributed content actually appears in those works is the entire load-bearing task. Failure to catch a wrong year, a misattributed edition, or a citation whose actual content does not match the claim made in the text directly invalidates the delegation.
